descriptions: Level progression numbers are different
Level number and progression values differ
Different level state is displayed across the interface (Level 2 vs Level 4), including the level path node index values and the bottom button text.
Board is flat/front-facing instead of tilted with perspective, and is larger, overlapping the title banner
The game board (marble grid) is not rotated as in the reference, and it is positioned higher up, overlapping with the 'Marble Run' title frame and the numbered level path.
Additional level indicator present
Extra confetti/decorative pieces scattered across screen not present in reference
Title header with game name is missing
Hearts/lives indicator missing
The life count container (hearts panel) at the top-left is completely missing.
Lives/hearts display positioned differently
Overall board layout altered with confetti decorations and extra UI elements overlapping board
The entire screen layout and state is fundamentally different, showing a level-select/map overlay instead of the active gameplay screen.
Extra UI element in bottom-right
Level map with numbered nodes (8,7,6,5,4) and 'Marble Run' title added, not present in reference
Floating rectangular party confetti pieces are scattered across the screen in our version.
Sound Effects text is displayed on two lines
Entire modal is zoomed in and shifted, causing top portion (close button, empty space below banner) to be cropped off-screen
The entire settings dialog is shifted upwards and cut off at the top of the viewport.
Bottom decorative element is missing
Achievement badge/ribbon below the modal is not visible
The background elements peeking from behind the main dialog are missing in the ours version.
Currency counter missing from top of screen
Coin counter/currency display missing from top right
The coin status bar at the top right of the screen is missing in our version.
Multiple decorative coins added
Extra scattered coin icons overlaid on the reward card and outside the card
Multiple floating gold coins are scattered on the left side of the reward card, which looks like an unaligned animation frame or misplaced assets.
Crown and reward text positioning
Overall layout is shifted down/cropped, cutting off top elements and pushing card content lower
The main reward card is significantly shifted downwards and cut off at the top, overlapping with the 'COMPLETED' banner incorrectly.
Next button text casing
Text styling for REWARD, +25, and Next button differ significantly
The 'Next' button text in our version is less stylized, lacking the dark outline and dimensional shadow effect.
Missing decorative ribbon banner element
Wooden crate/background texture behind the dialog card is missing
The dark wooden board structure framing the blue message card is missing.
Different emoji expression
Emoji used differs between versions
The sad face emoji illustration inside the card is completely different.
Watch button has wrong text
Button label differs from reference
The green button's label text differs.
Dialog box positioning differs
Content is scaled up and cropped, causing the wooden background panel to be missing and layout to shift off-frame
The top 'FAILED' banner is incorrectly scaled and positioned, spilling over the top edge and lacking the side-ribbon flaps structure shown in the reference.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 58% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
